articles.label: SpaceX
articles.headline: SpaceX Soars 27% in Nasdaq Debut as Shares Hit $172.17
articles.summary: SpaceX shares surged 27% on their Nasdaq debut, closing at $172.17. The IPO valued the company over $2 trillion, marking a milestone for Elon Musk's aerospace venture.

articles.label: Starlink
articles.headline: Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX shares jump
articles.summary: Shares in Elon Musk's SpaceX jumped 11 percent to $150 on their first day of trading Friday after the biggest initial public offering in history, making the polarizing entrepreneur the world's first trillionaire as he vowed to take humanity to Mars.
